fault_hypothesis: The rate limit check on line 62 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which allows one more task than the specified limit. It should use greater-than-or-equal-to (`>=`) to correctly deny tasks when the window is full.

constraints.intent: The buggy comparison fails only when the number of recent events exactly equals the limit.
If a task is allowed, the number of recent events must be strictly less than the limit.

spec.expr: all(ts >= window_start__1 for ts in recent__1)

constraints.intent: All timestamps considered recent must fall within the current time window.
